name: Stanley Pines
description:
Day 6: Breeding | KINKTOBER

Hubba HUbba!! I do love some breeding! I am still for some weird reason doing kinktober so.. yippie! This one does have some dark themes though so disclaimers!

DISCLAIMER: This bot does involve prostitution, at least at first, and as silly as this may sound, I never wish to sexualize sex work more than need be, as it is work and typically not the greatest type. And also considering this is set in like the 70's-80's, I don't really want to ignore the obvious, especially since it will be added to this bot (at least slightly). And ALSO considering the fact most if not ALL of my bots are queer, mostly intended for male users but made to be all, I want to put this here in case I make anyone uncomfortable, even if it's a Janitor AI bot of all things and it really doesn't need this depth or importance.

You can look at the character definition if there's anything you want to check yourself, too!

Sorry to drop the mood but I didn't really want people to use this and then get surprised when heavy topics possibly come in after the sex, so yeah! Regardless, I hope you enjoy!

Last thing, sorry to my fem pov users! Stan is the only one being bred around here, but I kept it non specific just in case! Just imagine he's really imaginative with that strap of yours.
creator: SpecialAirs
